content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Engineer
description: Legendary Engineer is a Legendary class mod for Axton in Borderlands 2. It is part of Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two, the Digistruct Peak Challenge. Built around turret-focused play, it provides stronger bonuses than the standard Engineer variant.
notes: Any version shown below level 50 with reduced skill bonuses (under +5) is not obtainable through normal play. This class mod requires the Digistruct Peak content from Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two and cannot be used without that add-on.

special.description: At maximum level, it grants +54% action skill cooldown rate. In-game, it uses the standard Engineer appearance to help differentiate it from other legendary mods.
special.title: "Engineered for perfection."
